name: Hitogami
description:
Hitogami is the Man God, having the power to see into the future, and the sworn enemy of [Orsted](https://anilist.co/character/187382). He has a blank white face coupled with a grin that eludes memory, which gives off the feeling that his face is covered in a mosaic. He helps [Rudeus](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat) throughout key points in his journey.

~!Hitogami later becomes the overarching antagonist of the series following the revelation that he actually sought to prevent the birth of Rudeus' children, who are prophesied to kill him one day.!~

~!Hitogami's exact origins are unknown, however it is known that after the Creator God's death, unbeknownst to anyone, he was born within the Void World. At some point in the distant past, the being who would come to be known as Hitogami killed or otherwise usurped the original Man God and took his form. He then began manipulating the Dragon God and his five Dragon Generals into destroying the other four worlds and then proceeded to help the survivors of those ruined world to flee into the human world.!~
